prophecies.q: 电动潜水艇——《海底两万里》
prophecies.a: 凡尔纳描述了「鹦鹉螺号」——一艘由电力驱动的潜水艇，能够长期在深海航行，拥有双层船壳、压载水舱、电力照明、空气循环系统和先进的武器装置。
prophecies.q_en: Electric Submarine — Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas
prophecies.a_en: Verne described the Nautilus — an electrically powered submarine capable of long-term deep-sea voyages, featuring a double hull, ballast tanks, electric lighting, air recycling systems, and advanced weaponry.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1954年，美国海军建造了世界上第一艘核动力潜艇，命名为「鹦鹉螺号」（USS Nautilus SSN-571），直接致敬凡尔纳。现代潜艇的双层船壳、压载水舱、电力系统等核心设计与小说描述高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1954, the US Navy launched the world's first nuclear-powered submarine, named USS Nautilus (SSN-571) as a direct tribute to Verne. Modern submarine features — double hull, ballast tanks, electrical systems — closely match the novel's descriptions.

prophecies.q: 载人登月——《从地球到月球》《环绕月球》
prophecies.a: 三名旅行者乘坐一枚巨型炮弹从佛罗里达发射升空，飞向月球并环绕其轨道飞行，最终溅落在太平洋中被一艘美国海军舰艇打捞。
prophecies.q_en: Manned Moon Mission — From the Earth to the Moon & Around the Moon
prophecies.a_en: Three travelers are launched from Florida inside a giant projectile, fly to the Moon and orbit it, then splash down in the Pacific Ocean and are recovered by a US Navy vessel.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1969年阿波罗11号实现了人类首次登月。与凡尔纳的设想惊人地吻合：三名宇航员、从佛罗里达（肯尼迪航天中心）发射、太平洋溅落回收。发射地点仅相距约200公里。小说甚至准确预测了失重现象和返回时的减速问题。
prophecies.verdict_en: Apollo 11 achieved the first Moon landing in 1969. The parallels with Verne are striking: three astronauts, launch from Florida (Kennedy Space Center), Pacific Ocean splashdown recovery. The launch sites are only about 200 km apart. The novel even accurately predicted weightlessness and re-entry deceleration challenges.

prophecies.q: 直升飞机——《征服者罗比尔》
prophecies.a: 工程师罗比尔建造了「信天翁号」——一艘依靠多组水平旋翼实现垂直起降的飞行器，由电力驱动，能够在空中悬停和自由移动。
prophecies.a_en: Engineer Robur builds the Albatross — an aircraft using multiple horizontal rotors for vertical takeoff and landing, electrically powered, capable of hovering and free movement in the air.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1907年保罗·科尔尼制造了第一架能自由飞行的直升机。伊戈尔·西科尔斯基于1939年成功试飞了第一架实用型直升机VS-300。凡尔纳描述的旋翼飞行器概念比莱特兄弟的固定翼飞机（1903年）还早17年，比实用直升机早53年。
prophecies.verdict_en: Paul Cornu built the first free-flying helicopter in 1907. Igor Sikorsky successfully tested the first practical helicopter (VS-300) in 1939. Verne's rotary-wing aircraft concept predated the Wright Brothers' fixed-wing airplane (1903) by 17 years and practical helicopters by 53 years.

prophecies.q: 视频通话与新闻广播——《2889年》
prophecies.a: 在未来世界中，人们通过「电话望远镜」（phonotelephote）进行面对面视频通话。新闻不再印刷在纸上，而是每天直接「说」给订阅者听。
prophecies.q_en: Videoconferencing & News Broadcasting — In the Year 2889
prophecies.a_en: In the future world, people communicate face-to-face via the 'phonotelephote' (video telephone). News is no longer printed on paper but 'spoken' directly to subscribers daily.
prophecies.verdict_zh: AT&T于1927年首次演示了视频电话技术。2000年代起，视频通话（Skype、FaceTime、Zoom）成为日常通信方式。广播新闻从1920年代开始普及（KDKA电台1920年首播），后来发展为电视新闻和网络流媒体新闻。凡尔纳描述的核心概念完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: AT&T first demonstrated video telephony in 1927. From the 2000s, video calling (Skype, FaceTime, Zoom) became routine. Radio news broadcasting began in the 1920s (KDKA's first broadcast in 1920), later evolving into TV news and streaming media. Verne's core concepts were fully realized.

prophecies.q: 电力驱动的现代城市——《二十世纪的巴黎》
prophecies.a: 1960年代的巴黎：电力驱动的城市交通网络、玻璃幕墙高楼、电力路灯、电子计算机器和自动化工厂。社会高度技术化但文化枯燥。
prophecies.q_en: Electric-Powered Modern City — Paris in the Twentieth Century
prophecies.a_en: 1960s Paris: an electric-powered urban transit network, glass-curtain skyscrapers, electric streetlights, electronic calculating machines, and automated factories. A highly technological but culturally arid society.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 凡尔纳1863年完成此书，但出版商赫泽尔认为内容过于不切实际而拒绝出版，手稿直到1994年才被发现并出版。书中描述的电力交通、玻璃幕墙建筑、电灯、计算机器等在20世纪中期已全部实现。对技术化社会中文化衰退的警告也颇具先见之明。
prophecies.verdict_en: Verne completed this book in 1863, but publisher Hetzel rejected it as too unrealistic; the manuscript was not discovered and published until 1994. The electric transit, glass-curtain buildings, electric lights, and calculating machines described in the book were all realized by the mid-20th century. His warning about cultural decline in a technological society proved prescient as well.

prophecies.q: 深海探索与海底生态——《海底两万里》
prophecies.a: 鹦鹉螺号的船员在深海中观察到丰富的海洋生态系统，包括珊瑚礁、深海鱼群、巨型章鱼，并在海底进行「漫步」探索亚特兰蒂斯遗迹。
prophecies.q_en: Deep-Sea Exploration — Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas
prophecies.a_en: The Nautilus crew observe rich deep-sea ecosystems including coral reefs, deep-sea fish, giant squid, and conduct underwater 'walks' to explore ruins of Atlantis.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年，雅克·皮卡尔和唐·沃尔什乘坐「的里雅斯特号」深潜器下潜至马里亚纳海沟最深处（10,916米）。深海潜水器、水下行走（潜水服）、深海生态研究在20世纪后半叶全面展开。詹姆斯·卡梅隆2012年独自下潜至海沟底部。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1960, Jacques Piccard and Don Walsh descended to the deepest point of the Mariana Trench (10,916m) in the Trieste bathyscaphe. Deep-sea submersibles, underwater walks (diving suits), and deep-sea ecology research expanded throughout the late 20th century. James Cameron solo-dived to the trench floor in 2012.

prophecies.q: 太空旅行的失重现象——《从地球到月球》
prophecies.a: 在炮弹飞船到达地球和月球引力平衡点时，旅行者们经历了完全失重状态：身体悬浮、物品飘浮在空中。
prophecies.q_en: Weightlessness in Space — From the Earth to the Moon
prophecies.a_en: When the projectile reaches the gravitational neutral point between Earth and Moon, the travelers experience complete weightlessness: bodies float, objects drift in midair.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1961年尤里·加加林首次载人航天，证实了太空失重现象。凡尔纳对失重状态的描述——人和物体在舱内飘浮——与真实的太空体验完全一致，尽管他对引力中和点的物理学理解有误（实际上整个自由落体过程中都会失重）。
prophecies.verdict_en: Yuri Gagarin's first manned spaceflight in 1961 confirmed weightlessness in space. Verne's depiction of weightlessness — people and objects floating inside the cabin — matches real space experience exactly, though his physics of the gravitational neutral point was incorrect (weightlessness actually occurs throughout free fall).

prophecies.q: 电动潜艇的武器系统——《海底两万里》
prophecies.a: 鹦鹉螺号装备了电击式攻击装置，可以在水下发射电击弹丸击毁敌舰，并使用强力探照灯在深海中照明和作战。
prophecies.q_en: Submarine Weapons — Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas
prophecies.a_en: The Nautilus is equipped with an electric ramming apparatus, can fire electric projectiles to destroy enemy ships underwater, and uses powerful searchlights for deep-sea illumination and combat.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 一战期间（1914-1918年），潜艇首次被大规模用于海战，德国U型潜艇使用鱼雷击沉大量协约国舰船。鱼雷（自推进式水下武器）的概念与凡尔纳描述的水下攻击方式相吻合。水下探照灯也在20世纪初得到应用。
prophecies.verdict_en: During WWI (1914-1918), submarines were first used extensively in naval warfare, with German U-boats sinking numerous Allied vessels using torpedoes. The torpedo (self-propelled underwater weapon) concept aligns with Verne's description of underwater attack capabilities. Underwater searchlights were also developed in the early 20th century.

prophecies.q: 水肺潜水装备——《海底两万里》
prophecies.a: 船员穿戴自携式呼吸装备在海底行走，装备由背负式压缩空气罐和面罩组成，可在水下自由活动数小时。
prophecies.q_en: Scuba Diving Equipment — Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Seas
prophecies.a_en: Crew members walk on the ocean floor wearing self-contained breathing apparatus consisting of back-mounted compressed air tanks and masks, allowing hours of free movement underwater.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1943年，雅克-伊夫·库斯托和埃米尔·加尼昂发明了Aqua-Lung——现代水肺潜水装备的原型，由背负式压缩空气罐和调节器组成。这与凡尔纳在73年前描述的装备惊人地相似。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1943, Jacques-Yves Cousteau and Émile Gagnan invented the Aqua-Lung — the prototype of modern scuba gear, consisting of back-mounted compressed air tanks and a regulator. This is strikingly similar to the equipment Verne described 73 years earlier.

prophecies.q: 太阳帆飞船——《从地球到月球》
prophecies.a: 小说中讨论了利用光压（太阳光的推力）作为太空推进方式的可能性。
prophecies.q_en: Solar Sails — From the Earth to the Moon
prophecies.a_en: The novel discusses the possibility of using light pressure (thrust from sunlight) as a means of space propulsion.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年，日本宇宙航空研究开发机构（JAXA）成功发射了IKAROS——世界上第一个成功部署的太阳帆飞船，利用太阳光压作为推力在星际空间航行，验证了凡尔纳145年前讨论的概念。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2010, JAXA successfully launched IKAROS — the world's first successfully deployed solar sail spacecraft, using solar light pressure for interplanetary propulsion, validating the concept Verne discussed 145 years earlier.

prophecies.q: 电力照明——《海底两万里》《二十世纪的巴黎》
prophecies.a: 鹦鹉螺号全船使用电灯照明。《二十世纪的巴黎》中描绘了电力路灯照亮整座城市的夜景。
prophecies.q_en: Electric Lighting — Twenty Thousand Leagues & Paris in the Twentieth Century
prophecies.a_en: The entire Nautilus is illuminated by electric lights. Paris in the Twentieth Century depicts electric streetlights illuminating the entire city at night.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1879年，托马斯·爱迪生发明了实用型白炽灯泡。1880年代，电灯开始在城市中普及，取代煤气灯成为主要照明方式。凡尔纳在电灯发明前16年就预见了电力照明的广泛应用。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1879, Thomas Edison invented the practical incandescent light bulb. In the 1880s, electric lights began spreading through cities, replacing gas lamps. Verne foresaw the widespread use of electric lighting 16 years before the light bulb was invented.

prophecies.q: 太空站——《赫克托·塞尔瓦达克》
prophecies.a: 一颗彗星掠过地球时带走了一块地表碎片，碎片上的人类被迫在太空中建立临时居住地，在一个封闭的小型世界中维持生存。
prophecies.a_en: A comet grazes Earth and carries away a fragment of land; the humans on it are forced to establish a temporary habitat in space, maintaining survival in a small enclosed world.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1971年，苏联发射了人类第一座太空站「礼炮1号」。此后，美国「天空实验室」（1973年）和国际空间站（1998年至今）相继建成。凡尔纳描述的太空中封闭式居住环境概念与现代太空站高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1971, the Soviet Union launched Salyut 1, the first space station. The US Skylab (1973) and the International Space Station (1998-present) followed. Verne's concept of enclosed habitation in space closely matches modern space stations.

prophecies.q: 电报与全球通信网络——《环游世界八十天》
prophecies.a: 主人公利用遍布全球的电报网络实时获取信息，新闻从一个大洲瞬间传到另一个大洲，使得全球旅行的计划和协调成为可能。
prophecies.q_en: Global Communication Network — Around the World in Eighty Days
prophecies.a_en: The protagonist uses a worldwide telegraph network to obtain real-time information; news travels instantly between continents, making the planning and coordination of global travel possible.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 跨大西洋海底电报电缆于1866年成功铺设并投入使用。凡尔纳在小说中生动描绘了全球电报网络如何改变了信息传播和旅行方式，这在1873年已经部分实现。他预见的全球实时通信网络在20世纪通过电话、互联网得到了更完整的实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: The transatlantic submarine telegraph cable was successfully laid and operational in 1866. Verne vividly depicted how a global telegraph network transformed information and travel, partially realized by 1873. His vision of a global real-time communication network was more fully realized in the 20th century through telephone and internet.

prophecies.q: 多功能战争机器——《世界主宰》
prophecies.a: 发明家制造了「恐怖号」——一台能够在陆地行驶、水面航行、水下潜行和空中飞行的多功能战争机器，速度极快，任何军队都无法追上或击败它。
prophecies.q_en: Multi-Function War Machine — Master of the World
prophecies.a_en: An inventor creates the Terror — a machine capable of driving on land, sailing on water, submerging underwater, and flying through the air at extreme speeds, beyond the reach of any military force.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然没有完全实现单一机器兼具陆海空潜四种能力，但各个方面都已有实现：水陆两栖车辆（1930年代）、水上飞机、潜水艇、坦克等。美军的两栖战车和现代无人机展示了多功能作战平台的趋势。DARPA曾研究过飞行潜艇概念。
prophecies.verdict_en: While no single machine combines land, sea, air, and submarine capabilities, each aspect has been realized: amphibious vehicles (1930s), seaplanes, submarines, and tanks. US military amphibious assault vehicles and modern drones show the trend toward multi-function combat platforms. DARPA has studied flying submarine concepts.

prophecies.q: 电动机器与自动化——《二十世纪的巴黎》
prophecies.a: 工厂由机器自动运行，人类只需监控操作。银行交易通过电子网络完成，手写文字被机械打印取代。
prophecies.q_en: Automation & Electronic Banking — Paris in the Twentieth Century
prophecies.a_en: Factories run automatically by machines with humans only monitoring. Bank transactions are completed via electronic networks. Handwriting is replaced by mechanical printing.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪中期，工业自动化全面展开。1950年代起，数控机床和自动化生产线投入使用。电子银行从1960年代开始发展（ATM于1967年首次出现），打字机在19世纪末已开始取代手写。凡尔纳对自动化社会的描述几乎完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Industrial automation expanded fully in the mid-20th century. From the 1950s, CNC machines and automated production lines came into use. Electronic banking developed from the 1960s (first ATM in 1967), and typewriters began replacing handwriting in the late 19th century. Verne's vision of an automated society was almost fully realized.

prophecies.a: 未来的报纸不再是印刷品，而是通过电子设备直接传送到订阅者家中，人们在屏幕上阅读当天的新闻。
prophecies.a_en: Future newspapers are no longer printed but transmitted electronically to subscribers' homes; people read the day's news on screens.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1990年代万维网兴起后，在线新闻迅速发展。2007年亚马逊推出Kindle电子阅读器，2010年苹果iPad发布后电子报刊阅读全面普及。凡尔纳在1889年描述的「屏幕阅读新闻」概念在101年后成为全球数十亿人的日常习惯。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the rise of the World Wide Web in the 1990s, online news expanded rapidly. Amazon launched the Kindle e-reader in 2007, and after Apple's iPad in 2010, electronic reading became mainstream. Verne's 1889 concept of 'reading news on screens' became a daily habit for billions of people 101 years later.
